In [132]:
def age (x):
    if x>18:
        return "18-30"
    elif x>30:
        return "31-60"
    else:
        return "61-90"

In [143]:
def risk_level(x):
    if x < 0.3:
        return "Low"
    elif x < 0.7:
        return "Medium"
    else:
        return "High"

In [154]:
sea.scatterplot(data=Diab_df, x="glucose_fasting", y="diabetes_risk_score")

plt.show()
In [156]:

sea.countplot(data=Diab_df, x="age_interval", hue="diagnosed_diabetes")
plt.title("age_interval vs Diagnosed Diabetes")
plt.show()

In [41]:
#diabetes increase with age
Diab_df["age_interval"] = pd.cut(
    Diab_df["age"],
    bins=[18,30,40,50,60,90],
    labels=["18–30","31–40","41–50","51–60","60+"]
)

sea.boxplot(x="age_interval", y="glucose_fasting", data=Diab_df)
Out[41]:
<Axes: xlabel='age_interval', ylabel='glucose_fasting'>
In [42]:
#fasting glucose above 140 -indicating diabetic 
sea.histplot(Diab_df["glucose_fasting"], kde=True)
plt.title("Fasting Glucose Distribution")
plt.show()
In [44]:
sea.histplot(Diab_df["glucose_postprandial"], kde=True)
plt.title("Post-Prandial Glucose Distribution")
plt.show()
